concerns.analysis: According to the provided image manifest, all extracted images have 'valid': false and contain the error 'No module named \'PIL\''. Because the base64 data is corrupt, these meaningful maps and diagrams will render as broken links in the browser. Additionally, 'Map 3' (page 6 of the source PDF) has been completely omitted from the HTML output entirely.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Map 3. Area where Hydrilla monitoring was conducted (red polygons).
concerns.output_quote: "valid": false for all 8 images in the manifest; no element or
concerns.location: Image Manifest / HTML output (missing Map 3 between Table 1 and Map 4)

concerns.description: Minor text differences beyond acceptable reformatting
concerns.analysis: Found a minor text difference that alters meaning in the visual investigation paragraph on page 2. The source mentions "edge of the fish net" while the output says "edge of the fish nest".
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Also observed were softball-sized masses/tangles of Eleocharis which were associated with fish nests and some of these tangles formed a ring just inside the edge of the fish net.
concerns.output_quote: Also observed were softball-sized masses/tangles of *Eleocharis* which were associated with fish nests and some of these tangles formed a ring just inside the edge of the fish nest.
concerns.location: Page 2, Results, paragraph starting with "Visual investigation..."
